base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of party_7_characters — a character (playable) from 1995 chrono trigger. Crono (silent protagonist swordsman), Marle (crossbow princess), Lucca (genius inventor), Frog (cursed knight Glenn), Robo (R-66Y repurposed robot), Ayla (prehistoric warrior chief), Magus (Dark Lord antagonist-joinable). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
